name: American Spirit
description_short: American Spirit appears to be a non-profit organization, but website access is currently restricted (403 Forbidden). Cannot verify current services or operations.
description_long: American Spirit operates under the domain americanspirit.org, which typically indicates a non-profit structure. The organization was categorized as a payday-alternative lender, suggesting it may provide credit union PALs, employer advances, or CDFI lending products designed to serve as alternatives to traditional payday loans with lower APR caps (typically under 36%). However, the website is currently inaccessible due to a 403 Forbidden error, preventing verification of current services, lending terms, eligibility requirements, or operational status. This access restriction raises questions about the company's current activity level and whether it continues to actively serve consumers. The .org domain and original payday-alternative categorization suggest the organization may position itself as a community-based or non-profit lender, which would align more closely with credit counseling or community development financial institution models. Without access to official website content, descriptions, or service details, it is impossible to confirm what American Spirit currently offers, who they serve, or what their actual business model entails. Any profile details would be speculative and potentially inaccurate.
services: Personal loans (typically lower rates than banks)
pros: Not-for-profit — typically lower fees and better rates than banks
NCUA insured — deposits protected up to $250,000
Low-income designated — may offer Payday Alternative Loans (PALs)

diagnosis: Cannot recommend or assess American Spirit at this time. The website is inaccessible, preventing verification of services, legitimacy, or current operations. Consumers should seek alternative, verifiable lenders or contact the organization directly through other channels before considering any services.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
